
```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| warning: false
//| output: false
makeWidth = function(inputWidth) {
  if (inputWidth>826) {
    return 350
  }
  else {
    return (width-100) / 2
  }
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| warning: false
//| output: false
germanLocale = d3.formatLocale({
  decimal: ",",
  thousands: "",
  grouping: [3], 
  currency: ["€", " "],
})

hexToRgb = function(hex) {
  const bigint = parseInt(hex.replace(/^#/, ""), 16)
  const r = (bigint >> 16) & 255
  const g = (bigint >> 8) & 255
  const b = bigint & 255
  return `(${r}, ${g}, ${b})`
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| warning: false
//| output: false
colors = [
  "#72bb6f",
  "#559bd5",
  "#f3d039",
  "#c3423f", 
  "#12a7e7",
  "#96b428",
  "#559e8f",
  "#f3d039",
  "#559e8f",
  "#2d5b5e",
]
colors_diverging = [
  "#2d76b3", 
  "#559bd5", 
  "#99c4e6",
  "#bbd7ee", 
  "#ddebf7", 
  "#e3f1e2", 
  "#c7e3c6", 
  "#abd6a9", 
  "#72bb6f", 
  "#4b9847",
]
colors_npr = [
  "#D62021",
  "#000000",
  "#237BBD",
]
colors_burger = [
  "#D62300",
  "#F5EBDC",
  "#703a28", // lighter
  "#FF8732",
  // "#F5EBDC",
  "#198737",
  "#FFAA00",
]
colors_oekostrom = [
  "#05a56f",
  "#eb6761",
  "#b4e800",
  "#26c4d3",
  "#d28cec",
  "#aaaaaa",
  "#ffffff",
  "#ffd925"
]
colors_fiw = [
  "#3e5ba2", // deep blue
  "#df5154", // vibrant red
  "#4caf50", // green
  "#ffb74d", // orange
  "#9575cd", // purple
  "#26c6da", // cyan
  "#f06292", // pink
  "#ffd54f"  // yellow
]

// Lebensmittel (Food - Meal)
path1 = "M17.92,12.85a12.37,12.37,0,0,1,4.58,9.63H7.7a6.21,6.21,0,1,1,0-12.41h2.39a12.31,12.31,0,0,1,3.51.5 M17.73,9.11l.95,1-.46,1.85a7.36,7.36,0,0,1-1.92,3.4h0a2.71,2.71,0,0,1-3.82,0h0a2.69,2.69,0,0,1,0-3.82h0a7.24,7.24,0,0,1,3.39-1.92Z M21.55,6.25L18.2,9.59 M20.59,5.3L22.5,7.2"

// Wohnen (Housing)
path2 = "M10 20v-6h4v6h5v-8h3L12 3 2 12h3v8z"

// Energie (Energy)
path3 = "M9 21c0 .55.45 1 1 1h4c.55 0 1-.45 1-1v-1H9v1zm3-19C8.14 2 5 5.14 5 9c0 2.38 1.19 4.47 3 5.74V17c0 .55.45 1 1 1h6c.55 0 1-.45 1-1v-2.26c1.81-1.27 3-3.36 3-5.74 0-3.86-3.14-7-7-7z"

// Mobilität (Mobility)
path4 = "M18.92 6.01C18.72 5.42 18.16 5 17.5 5h-11c-.66 0-1.21.42-1.42 1.01L3 12v8c0 .55.45 1 1 1h1c.55 0 1-.45 1-1v-1h12v1c0 .55.45 1 1 1h1c.55 0 1-.45 1-1v-8l-2.08-5.99zM6.5 16c-.83 0-1.5-.67-1.5-1.5S5.67 13 6.5 13s1.5.67 1.5 1.5S7.33 16 6.5 16zm11 0c-.83 0-1.5-.67-1.5-1.5s.67-1.5 1.5-1.5 1.5.67 1.5 1.5-.67 1.5-1.5 1.5zM5 11l1.5-4.5h11L19 11H5z"

// Güter (Goods)
path5 = "M16 4c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2h-4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2H4l-2 2v3h2v12h16V9h2V6l-2-2h-4z"

// Dienstleistungen (Services)
path6 = "M22.5 22.5L1.5 22.5L1.5 20.59L2.46 18.68L21.55 18.68L22.5 20.59ZM11.75 5.32h.49a9.3 9.3 0 0 1 9.3 9.3v.25H2.45v-.25a9.3 9.3 0 0 1 9.3-9.3ZM12 1.5v3.82M9.14 1.5h5.72M5.32 14.86h13.36v3.82H5.32Z"

// Emissionen (Emissions - Factory with smoke)
path7 = "M21,26.65V24.8a1.25,1.25,0,0,0-1.26-1.26H13.84a1.26,1.26,0,0,0-1.26,1.26V26a1.26,1.26,0,0,0,1.26,1.26h.1l-.23,3.49A1.28,1.28,0,0,0,12.58,32v1.22a1.27,1.27,0,0,0,.9,1.21L12.2,54.6a1.17,1.17,0,0,0,.32.91,1.23,1.23,0,0,0,.9.39H22.13l-.88-13.73a1.26,1.26,0,0,0,1-1.23V32A1.25,1.25,0,0,0,21,30.77l-.22-3.49Z M17.27,21.43A2.46,2.46,0,0,0,19,20.7a2.42,2.42,0,0,0,.51-.76A3.55,3.55,0,0,0,22,18.88,3.46,3.46,0,0,0,23,17a4,4,0,1,0-3.07-6.83,4,4,0,0,0-1.17,2.59,3.68,3.68,0,0,0-1.86,1,3.63,3.63,0,0,0-1,3.17,3.92,3.92,0,0,0-.33.27A2.49,2.49,0,0,0,14.8,19a2.48,2.48,0,0,0,2.47,2.47Z"

// Half shapes (simplified left-half representations)

// Food - left half of meal
path1_half = "M12,12.85 L12,22.48 H7.7a6.21,6.21,0,1,1,0-12.41h2.39 M12,11.5 a2.71,2.71,0,0,1-3.82,0h0a2.69,2.69,0,0,1,0-3.82"

// Housing - left half of house
path2_half = "M12 3L2 12H5V20H10V14H12V12V3Z"

// Energy - left half of lightbulb
path3_half = "M12 2C8.14 2 5 5.14 5 9C5 11.38 6.19 13.47 8 14.74V17C8 17.55 8.45 18 9 18H12V22H12V18H12V14.74V9V2Z"

// Mobility - left half of car
path4_half = "M12 5H6.5C5.67 5 5.11 5.42 4.91 6.01L3 12V20C3 20.55 3.45 21 4 21H5C5.55 21 6 20.55 6 20V19H12V20V12V5ZM6.5 16C5.67 16 5 15.33 5 14.5S5.67 13 6.5 13S8 13.67 8 14.5S7.33 16 6.5 16ZM5 11L6.5 6.5H12V11H5Z"

// Goods - left half of shopping bag
path5_half = "M12 4H10C10 5.1 9.1 6 8 6C6.9 6 6 5.1 6 4H4L2 6V9H4V21H12V9V6V4Z"

// Services - left half of cloche/dome
path6_half = "M12 5.32H11.75C11.18 5.32 10.64 5.39 10.12 5.51C6.39 6.36 3.45 9.54 2.68 13.49C2.52 14.19 2.45 14.9 2.45 15.62V14.87H12V5.32ZM12 1.5V3.82V5.32M9.14 1.5H12M1.5 22.5L1.5 20.59L2.46 18.68H12V22.5H1.5ZM5.32 14.86H12V18.68H5.32Z"

// Emissions - left half of factory
path7_half = "M17.62 23.54H13.84C13.27 23.54 12.58 24.09 12.58 24.8V26C12.58 26.71 13.18 27.26 13.84 27.26H17.62V30.77V55.9H13.42C12.84 55.9 12.68 55.67 12.52 55.51C12.35 55.36 12.2 54.99 12.2 54.6L13.48 34.34C13.12 34.08 12.91 33.67 12.91 33.22V32C12.91 31.55 13.12 31.14 13.48 30.88C13.48 30.88 13.48 27.26 13.48 27.26H17.62V23.54ZM17.27 21.43C16.87 21.43 16.17 21.22 15.64 20.78C15.11 20.33 14.8 19.69 14.8 19C14.8 17.5 15.5 15.8 17.27 13V21.43Z"
```
